title: Database connection pool exhausted
symptoms: Application logs show timeout errors when connecting to PostgreSQL. Requests fail under peak load.
root_cause: Database connection pool limit was reached due to too many concurrent requests.
resolution: Increase connection pool size, optimize queries, and add connection timeout handling.

title: Out of memory in application service
symptoms: Service crashes with OOMKilled events and memory usage spikes before restart.
root_cause: Memory leak caused by unbounded object growth in worker processes.
resolution: Fix memory leak, add memory profiling, and increase memory limits temporarily.

title: Missing environment variable after deployment
symptoms: Application fails immediately after deployment with configuration or key errors.
root_cause: Required environment variable was not set in the deployment environment.
resolution: Add the missing environment variable and validate deployment configs before release.

title: External API rate limit exceeded
symptoms: Logs show 429 errors and downstream requests start failing intermittently.
root_cause: The service exceeded the rate limits imposed by an external API.
resolution: Add retry with backoff, caching, and rate limiting on the client side.

title: Disk space exhaustion on server
symptoms: Write operations fail and logs show no space left on device.
root_cause: Disk usage grew due to accumulated logs and temporary files.
resolution: Clear old files, rotate logs, and set disk monitoring alerts.
